description_long: This is a modern, three-story apartment building with a flat, patterned roof and a light-colored facade. The front features large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto balconies with transparent railings, providing outdoor space for each unit. The building's sides are simpler, with evenly spaced windows and balconies only at the corners. The rear has a symmetrical arrangement of windows, with a central, larger window suggesting a stairwell or common area. The ground floor includes a recessed main entrance, framed by stone detailing that matches the roof trim. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on functionality and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, three-story apartment building with large windows, balconies, and a flat patterned roof. The facade is light-colored with stone trim and transparent balcony railings.
description_view_0: The front view shows three floors with large windows and balconies on each side, plus a central section without balconies.
description_view_1: This side view reveals a simpler facade with evenly spaced windows and balconies only at the building's edges, as well as the main entrance at the bottom center.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a symmetrical window arrangement, with a prominent central window and no balconies.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the other side, with evenly spaced windows and corner balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, with consistent spacing and alignment across all facades. Balconies are present on the front and sides, while the rear features a central large window.
